title: The Mimicer (horror)
body:
LORE
Steve was minding his bussines gathering logs but an Black Alien parasite from the caves has entered Steve's body wich Caused Deformation and changes in Steve's body and appearnce, As the days progresses Steve's limbs would become unnaturaly long. and the Parasite has spread through Steve's nervous system and Brain keeping him alive, Steve painfully conscious and aware. his face would get exagurated Features like an inhuman Smile and bigger eye sockets, the parasite is very hostile and made him kill his pet and friends, he is in pain but cant do anything. as soon as he spots an player the parasite sees it as prey and will Start stalking the player and mimicing the voices of other people to lure its prey.
IT NOT A ANOMALY ITS A AILEN INSIDE OF STEVE
i am not gonna spoil what the mod does bc that ruins the horror

JOIN THE DISCORD
https://discord.gg/UrVvEWDhJf
made by sweaky 
IT HAS ITS OWN ID
BEFORE U SAY ANYTHING THIS IS NOT A COPY OF THE ANOMALY THIS MOD WAS CREATED FIRST, THE DATES DONT LIE
